decoder.name: nessus_custom_start
decoder.order: nessus_date, nessus_time, nessus_year, nessus_timezone, nessus_thread_id, nessus_user, nessus_name, nessus_scan_id, nessus_policy_id, nessus_message

decoder.name: nessus_custom_user_req

decoder.name: nessus_custom_finished
decoder.order: nessus_date, nessus_time, nessus_year, nessus_timezone, nessus_thread_id, nessus_scan_id, nessus_duration, nessus_message

decoder.order: nessus_date, nessus_time, nessus_year, nessus_timezone, nessus_thread_id, nessus_scan_id, nessus_message
